scope.summary: Closes P6 by proving the plan-bead-graph/v2 validator rejects malformed graphs, is covered by tests/CI, and accepts the committed full engineering-program manifest.
out_of_scope: No bulk Beads promotion was applied.
No imported engineering-program bead status was changed by this close.
No sibling rust-oracledb repository files or driver dependency overrides were touched.
Unrelated shared-checkout dirty files were not used as evidence.

entry_points.name: validator selftest
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --selftest` exited 0 with 15 mutation checks. It accepts a well-formed manifest and rejects duplicate slugs, duplicate tracking labels, unknown references, cycles, cross-repo native edges, checksum drift, unsupported schema, missing acceptance, SemVer disagreement, Beads-rejected label dots, both dependencies and blockers, same-repository handoffs, activated tasks depending on deferred tasks, and dangling live tracker edges.

entry_points.name: real engineering-program manifest
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --manifest engineering-program-manifest.json` exited 0 and reported PASS for program=engineering-program, tasks=174, repositories=1, promotions=deferred:2,excluded:124,held:48, hard=0.

entry_points.name: saved deterministic manifest output
entry_points.trace: tests/artifacts/plan_graph/engineering-program-manifest-lint.txt contains the committed PASS output generated by `python3 scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --manifest engineering-program-manifest.json | tee tests/artifacts/plan_graph/engineering-program-manifest-lint.txt` during the n4rnp close source commit.

entry_points.name: CI lint wiring
entry_points.trace: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs `python3 scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --selftest` in the lint job, so the validator's mutation checks are part of the repo gate.

entry_points.name: child manifest bead closed
entry_points.trace: `br show oraclemcp-n4rnp --json` reports status=closed with close_reason binding source=51db5ca99797f442a777f85d4117f8f4ffa6b22b and evidence=tests/artifacts/evidence/closes/oraclemcp-n4rnp.json.

limitations: The validator is read-only unless --promote --apply is explicitly used; this close proves validation and the deterministic promotion plan contracts, not a bulk import mutation.
Cross-repository work remains represented by checksum handoff records rather than native Beads edges.
